content:
COMPLETE VEGAN PLANT PROTEIN
ORGANIC PUMPKIN SEED PROTEIN & PISANE™ PEA PROTEIN

Vegan Plant Protein vs Animal Protein

VEGAN PLANT BASED PROTEIN:
- Made from plant based ingredients. Example: pumpkin seed protein & pea protein.
- Easily digestible and gentle on stomach.
- Allergen free – no dairy, lactose, gluten or soy.
- Will not cause bloating

ANIMAL BASED PROTEIN:
- Made from the isolated milk created as a by-product of cheese production. Example: whey protein
- Hard to digest. Excessive consumption can lead to intestinal toxemia
- Not suitable for people with lactose intolerance.
- May cause bloating or stomach cramps

Not everyone can tolerate proteins from animal sources, especially from milk proteins like whey protein. For them, our 100% plant protein provides a solution. However, even if you have not any issues with animal proteins vegan protein may be a good complement. It's highly recommended to rotate your protein sources on a regular basis (e.g. one-week whey, one-week vegan protein, etc.)

Suitable For:
- Elderly to prevent & reverse muscle loss
- Growing children who need protein to promote muscle growth
- Vegetarians who lack protein intake
- Pregnant and breastfeeding mum to help with fetus development and improving quality of breast milk
- Sports lover who need quick absorption of protein to repair muscles
- Those who want to lose weight or maintain body shape

Organic Pumpkin Seed Protein:

Organic pumpkin seeds are one of the preferred foods for people to strengthen their physique because of the abundant protein, dietary fiber, amino acids and low sodium. Advanced processing technology allows our organic pumpkin seed protein to preserve almost all of the original nutrients in pumpkin seeds and reduce the fats.

At the same time, it is a good choice to partly substitute protein in the diet to reduce the intake of cholesterol and saturated fat and balance the nutrition intake. Due to its pleasant nutty flavor and good dispensability, our pumpkin protein is easily soluble in water and has a great aroma.

Pumpkin Seed Protein Benefits:
- High in Fiber: A diet high in fiber can promote good digestive health, reduced risk of heart disease, diabetes & obesity.
- High in Zinc: Zinc may help to improve sperm quality and fertility in men.
- High in Antioxidants: Contains antioxidants like Carotenoids & Vitamin E
  • Reduce inflammation
  • Protect cell from harmful free radicals
- Very High in Magnesium: Pumpkin seeds are one of the best natural source of magnesium which help in:
  • Controlling blood pressure
  • Reducing heart disease risk
  • Forming and maintaining healthy bones
  • Regulating blood sugar
- Improve Prostate & Bladder Health: It may reduce symptoms of benign prostate enlargement and overactive bladder.

Full of Valuable Nutrients: Fiber, Carbs, Protein, Fat (including omega 6), Phosphorus, Iron, Zinc, Copper, Vitamin K

Pisane™ Pea Protein:

Pisane™ is the pure power of the pea. Pea protein is among the top plant proteins regarding nutritional value. According to scientific findings the essential amino acid profile makes it ideal for human consumption.

Pea protein contains all the essential amino acids that cannot be synthesized by humans in sufficient quantity to cover almost all of the daily requirement for adults. Pea protein is particularly high in leucine and lysine, essential amino acids involved in many fundamental body metabolic processes.

Pea protein supports muscle synthesis. Rich in Branched-Chain Amino Acids (BCAA), it also delays the fatigue perception during exercise. Pea protein is also rich in iron and arginine, enhancing strength, power performance and muscular recovery. The main role of this increased protein intake (by generating a positive protein balance) is to promote muscle growth and repair and to create an amino acid pool that will be partly oxidized during exercise to provide energy.

Pea protein promotes satiety feeling and supports lean body mass maintenance. It is also rich in leucine that supports muscle synthesis. It is also rich in arginine and lysine for good bone health.

Pisane™ Benefits:
- High Quality Protein Source: Pea Protein contains all 9 essential amino acids that your body cannot create (Valine, phenylalanine, threonine, methionine, tryptophan, isoleucine, lysine, histidine, leucine).
- Allergen-Free: Does not cause allergic reaction. Unlike the top 8 food allergens (Peanuts, Tree nuts, Eggs, Fish, Shellfish, Cow's milk, Wheat, Soy), pea protein is gentle and safe.
- Muscle Building and Repair: Rich amino acids in peas are perfect for repairing & building muscle.
- Rich in Iron: Pea Protein provides iron, arginine and branched chain amino acid. It is digested & absorbed well.
